user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: https://github.com/ludeeus/integration_keba_rest_api

error.connection: Unable to connect to the server.

fetch_data.name: Fetch data
fetch_data.description: Triggers an immediate data refresh for the targeted KEBA wallbox(es) instead of waiting for the next polling interval. If no target is specified, all configured wallboxes are refreshed.
